inputs.name: market
inputs.purpose: Market or index name

inputs.name: nStocks
inputs.purpose: Number of representative stocks to return

inputs.name: Source
inputs.purpose: Source used to build the market universe

inputs.name: RankByCap
inputs.purpose: Rank constituents by market capitalization

inputs.name: IncludeIndex
inputs.purpose: Include the market index in the first row

inputs.name: msg
inputs.purpose: Display progress messages

outputs.name: T
outputs.purpose: Output table of tickers and names

inputs.name: ticker
inputs.purpose: Ticker symbol or collection of ticker symbols

inputs.name: LastPeriod
inputs.purpose: Time span to download

inputs.name: interval
inputs.purpose: Sampling interval requested to Yahoo Finance

inputs.name: layoutHeights
inputs.purpose: Relative heights of the three panels

inputs.name: removeGaps
inputs.purpose: Remove night or weekend gaps in x-axis

inputs.name: breakAtSession
inputs.purpose: Add separators between sessions

inputs.name: nTicks
inputs.purpose: Number of ticks shown on x-axis when removeGaps=true

inputs.name: topPanelMode
type: admissible fields depend on Name: candle->{Name,widthFactor,upColor,downColor}; line->{Name}; ma->{Name,maFastLen,maMidLen,maSlowLen,showMACrossovers}

inputs.name: bottomPanelMode
type: admissible fields depend on Name: rsi->{Name,topRSI,lowRSI,rsiLen}; stoch->{Name,topStoch,lowStoch,stochLen,stochSmooth}; macd->{Name,macdFastLen,macdSlowLen,macdSigLen}; williamsr->{Name,topWilliams,lowWilliams,wrLen}; roc->{Name,rocLen}
inputs.purpose: Indicator shown in the bottom panel; when supplied as a struct, it also controls the suboptions associated with the selected indicator

inputs.name: showPanelHelp
inputs.purpose: Display textual explanation in Command Window

inputs.name: autoFixInterval
inputs.purpose: Automatically replace invalid range or interval combinations

inputs.name: plots
inputs.purpose: Create plots for each ticker

inputs.name: msg
inputs.purpose: Display progress messages

outputs.name: out
outputs.purpose: Structure array with downloaded time series and indicators

inputs.name: ticker
inputs.purpose: Ticker symbol or collection of ticker symbols

inputs.name: RankBy
inputs.purpose: Numeric variable used to rank rows in descending order

inputs.name: ExplainFields
inputs.purpose: Display explanation of available fields or presets

inputs.name: Fields
inputs.purpose: Field preset or custom list of output variables
